testcase.name: test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set

failure.message: ExceptionGroup: Hypothesis found 2 distinct failures. (2 sub-exceptions)

testcase.failure: + Exception Group Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py", line 111, in test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set | products=st.lists(product_record_strategy(), min_size=1, max_size=10, unique_by=lambda p: p["product_id"]), | ^^^^^^^ | File "/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.15/x64/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 2264, in wrapped_test | raise the_error_hypothesis_found | ExceptionGroup: Hypothesis found 2 distinct failures. (2 sub-exceptions) +-+---------------- 1 ---------------- | Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py", line 196, in test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set | assert "tenant" not in item, ( | AssertionError: Product prod_0000: 'tenant' field should be removed | assert 'tenant' not in {'active': True, 'is_parent': True, 'name': 'Product prod_0000', 'product_id': 'prod_0000', ...} | Falsifying example: test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set( | self=<tests.unit.test_property_channel_transform.TestProperty4ChannelToEventIdTransformation object at 0x7f9970375410>, | products=[{'product_id': 'prod_0000', | 'name': 'Product prod_0000', | 'is_parent': True, | 'active': True, | 'tenant': 'h-dcn'}], | carts=[], | ) | Explanation: | These lines were always and only run by failing examples: | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py:61 | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py:62 | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py:193 | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/scripts/migrate_products.py:463 | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/scripts/migrate_products.py:469 | /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.11.15/x64/lib/python3.11/logging/__init__.py:1501 | | You can reproduce this example by temporarily adding @reproduce_failure('6.155.2', b'AXicY2R0ZGg0QCMYHJmBNAMDAEbiBFQ=') as a decorator on your test case +---------------- 2 ---------------- | Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py", line 193, in test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set | assert "channel" not in item, ( | AssertionError: Product prod_0000: 'channel' field should be removed | assert 'channel' not in {'active': True, 'channel': 'h-dcn', 'is_parent': True, 'name': 'Product prod_0000', ...} | Falsifying example: test_channel_removed_and_event_id_set( | # The test always failed when commented parts were varied together. | self=<tests.unit.test_property_channel_transform.TestProperty4ChannelToEventIdTransformation object at 0x7f9970375410>, | products=[{'product_id': 'prod_0000', | 'name': 'Product prod_0000', | 'is_parent': True, | 'active': True, | 'channel': 'h-dcn'}], | carts=[], # or any other generated value | ) | Explanation: | These lines were always and only run by failing examples: | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py:59 | /home/runner/work/h-dcn/h-dcn/backend/tests/unit/test_property_channel_transform.py:193 | testcase.name: test_non_presmeet_channels_get_null_event_id

testcase.name: test_submit_accepts_valid_variant_parent_match

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200 for valid variant, got 500: {"error": "Failed to generate order number. Please retry."} assert 500 == 200 Falsifying example: test_submit_accepts_valid_variant_parent_match( # The test always failed when commented parts were varied together. self=<tests.unit.test_property_order_handlers.TestProperty13OrderValidationPipeline object at 0x7f9970403cd0>, product={'product_id': 'e3e70682-c209-4cac-629f-6fbed82c07cd', 'name': '0', 'price': 1, 'is_parent': True, 'active': True}, # or any other generated value has_event_id=False, # or any other generated value )
You can reproduce this example by temporarily adding @reproduce_failure('6.155.2', b'AEEAgTBBAQA=') as a decorator on your test case

Please retry."} E assert 500 == 200 E Falsifying example: test_submit_accepts_valid_variant_parent_match( E # The test always failed when commented parts were varied together. E self=<tests.unit.test_property_order_handlers.TestProperty13OrderValidationPipeline object at 0x7f9970403cd0>, E product={'product_id': 'e3e70682-c209-4cac-629f-6fbed82c07cd', E 'name': '0', E 'price': 1, E 'is_parent': True, E 'active': True}, # or any other generated value E has_event_id=False, # or any other generated value E ) E E You can reproduce this example by temporarily adding @reproduce_failure('6.155.2', b'AEEAgTBBAQA=') as a decorator on your test case
